response.justification: Candidate is a strong hands-on senior/staff full-stack engineer with broad polyglot experience and entrepreneurial open-source work, but the role targets a Director-level Principal Engineer with ~15 years and recognized AI expertise. Candidate has roughly 13-16 years depending on counting, only recent and limited AI exposure (MCP/agentic tooling at re:cinq since April 2025), no demonstrated AI platform leadership, no advanced AI degree, and no evidence of advising strategic customers or shaping cloud/AI product strategy at the level required.
strengths: Broad polyglot full-stack and infrastructure background across web, mobile, embedded
Entrepreneurial founder experience with open-source GIS platform serving real users
Recent hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure, MCP, and developer tooling
concerns: No recognized AI expertise or shipped AI products/platforms at scale
Lacks Principal/Director-level strategic leadership and customer advisory experience
Limited cloud-platform depth; no demonstrated AI strategy or differentiation work
